  "findings": [
    "Repetitive, low-frequency impact-like clicking sound indicating a localized defect on a bearing race or rolling element",
    "Clear cyclic knocking noise superimposed on the normal machine bed noise"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Schedule immediate bearing replacement during the next planned maintenance window",
    "Monitor bearing temperature and vibration levels closely until replacement",
    "Check lubrication for contamination or metal particles"
  ],
  "rationale": "The audio recording reveals a distinct, periodic impact sound (clicking/knocking) at approximately 4.5 Hz, which is characteristic of a localized defect (such as spalling or cracking) on a bearing race or rolling element in a slow-turning conveyor drive. This indicates a worn and degraded component that is at high risk of progressing to catastrophic failure if not addressed.",
  "references": [
    "SKF Bearing Damage and Failure Analysis Guide",
    "ISO 15243 Rolling bearings — Damage and failures"
  ]
}
